title: eriastrum densifolium subsp. patens
intro: Eriastrum densifolium subsp. patens, also known as the spreading fairy lantern, is a flowering plant species in the phlox family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eriastrum densifolium subsp. patens include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
